stemHtml: What are the actions to unfeather a variable pitch prop…

options.a: Move the propeller lever forward into the normal operating range, resulting in a blade angle with no thrust.
options.b: Move the propeller lever forward into the normal operating range, resulting in a blade angle producing thrust.
options.c: Move the propeller lever backward into the normal operating range, resulting in a blade angle with no thrust.
options.d: Move the propeller lever backward into the normal operating range, resulting in a blade angle producing thrust.
